title: Who will win the 2026 South Carolina Republican Senate special primary?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 68%, modal YES) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: The evidence indicates that the South Carolina Republican Senate special primary is highly competitive with multiple candidates vying for the seat. Prediction markets are active, but no single candidate has emerged as a clear favorite. The base rate for Senate vacancies being filled through special elections suggests a dynamic and unpredictable process. While there is public interest and analysis,
key_drivers: Active prediction markets reflecting public sentiment but no clear favorite
Uncertain voter preferences and campaign strategies
reference_classes: Senate vacancies filled through special elections
Competitive primary elections with multiple candidates
